languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

languages.text: "Столько фон Валанциусов на одном корабле... больше их было только накануне гибели Теодоры. Надеюсь, в этот раз число не будет сокращаться столь... драматически".
"So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."
languages.original_text: "Столько фон Валанциусов на одном корабле... больше их было только накануне гибели Теодоры. Надеюсь, в этот раз число не будет сокращаться столь... драматически".

traits.locale_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."
"I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."
"I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

languages.text: 「ヴァランシウス家の人たち、こんなに多いのは、シオドーラが亡くなった前以来だ。今回は、人数が激減しないことを願う」
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: 「バルアンシウス家の人たち、こんなに多いのは、テオドラが亡くなった前以来だ。今回は、人数が激減しないことを願う。」

languages.text: « Tous ces von Valancius sur un même vaisseau... Il n'y en a pas eu autant à bord depuis la mort de Théodora. J'espère que leur nombre ne va pas diminuer aussi radicalement, cette fois. »
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: « Tous ces von Valancius sur un même vaisseau... Il n'y en a pas eu autant à bord depuis la mort de Théodora. J'espère que leur nombre ne va pas diminuer aussi radicalement, cette fois. »

languages.text: "So viele von Valancius auf einem Raumschiff ... So viele waren seit Theodoras Tod nicht mehr an Bord. Ich hoffe, dieses Mal gehen die Zahlen nicht so dramatisch zurück."
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: "So viele von Valancius auf einem Raumschiff ... So viele waren seit Theodoras Tod nicht mehr an Bord. Ich hoffe, dieses Mal gehen die Zahlen nicht so dramatisch zurück."

languages.text: "Tek bir uçsuz gemisinde bu kadar çok von Valancius... Theodora'nın ölümünden bu yana gemide bu kadarı bir arada bulunmamıştı. Umarım bu sefer sayılar dramatik bir şekilde azalmaz."
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: "Tek bir uçsuz gemisinde bu kadar çok von Valancius... Theodora'nın ölümünden bu yana gemide bu kadarı bir arada bulunmamıştı. Umarım bu sefer sayılar dramatik bir şekilde azalmaz."

languages.text: «Cuántos von Valancius en una misma nave del vacío... No había tantos a bordo desde antes de la muerte de Theodora. Esperemos que esta vez el número no baje de un modo tan drástico».
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: «Cuántos von Valancius en una misma nave del vacío... No había tantos a bordo desde antes de la muerte de Theodora. Esperemos que esta vez el número no baje de un modo tan drástico».

languages.text: “一条虚空舰上竟然有这么多冯·瓦兰修斯家的人……自西奥多拉过世以来，还从未有过这般阵仗。但愿这次人数不会再那样骤减了。”
languages.original_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

traits.locale_text: “一条虚空舰上竟然有这么多冯·瓦兰修斯家的人……自西奥多拉过世以来，还从未有过这般阵仗。但愿这次人数不会再那样骤减了。”
